mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: urinary urgency, restless, short stature with barrel-shaped chest, skin rashes, mitral regurgitation, restrictive cardiomyopathy, palpitations, dyspnea, difficulty walking, and tip-toe gait

seizures, abnormal liver function leading to cholestasis causing pruritus, neurological symptoms including ataxia, myoclonus, and vertical supranuclear gaze palsy, splenomegaly, hepatosplenomegaly, pulmonary involvement, and lymphoproliferative disorders

short stature, characteristic facies, connective tissue laxity, hypercalcemia, hypersensitivity to allergens, renal calcifications, and cardiovascular anomalies such as subvalvular aortic stenosis or peripheral pulmonic stenosis
darkened urine due to homogentistic acid accumulation, arthritis, valvular heart disease, and pigmented deposits in cartilage, sclera, and other tissues

tall stature, long limbs, disproportionately long fingers, scoliosis, joint hypermobility, ectopic lens, and cardiovascular manifestations such as dilation of the ascending aorta and mitral valve prolapse
recurrent fever episodes accompanied by serositis, erysipeloides-like erythema, and hemorrhagic complications; chronic inflammation may lead to amyloidosis and fibrosis affecting various organs
blue scleras, multiple fractures from minimal trauma, waddling gait, short stature, and respiratory insufficiency caused by vertebral compression
emphysema, liver cirrhosis, and increased susceptibility to lung infections
short stature, webbed neck, congenital lymphedema, coarctation of the aorta, and amenorrhea
